findings.description:
Discrepancy between phase_agent.py and Design D2 regarding system_prompt support. Design D2 states the harness Agent() tool does not support a system_prompt parameter, but phase_agent.py attempts to pass it in the options dict (line 352). This will likely cause sub-agent dispatch to fail or ignore the system prompt. phase_agent.py must be updated to fold the system_prompt into the prompt text using the 

---

 separator as described in the design.

The Proposal and Design artifacts are truncated at the end of the D-1 section (e.g., 'adding phase_archetype TEXT to the a'). This omits the full plan for the SQL migration and subsequent sections (D-2 status reporter details, etc.), preventing a complete review of the end-to-end wiring.

AgentInfo dataclass and its from_dict factory method are missing the phase_archetype field. This is a required update for G4 and D-1 (AgentInfo persistence) to expose which archetype an agent is currently running under.

report_status.py does not read or include phase_archetype in its POST /status/report payload. This wiring is required for G3 and D-2 to enable correlation of phase behavior with archetype in dashboards.

The proposal states that SKILL.md will parse the sub-agent's last message for (outcome, handoff_id) 'per the protocol in phase_agent._validate_result'. However, _validate_result is a Python type-check for a tuple, not a text-parsing regex. The proposal should specify the exact string format the sub-agent is instructed to use and the regex the orchestrator will use to parse it from the transcript to ensure robustness.
